name: qualia-v4-breadcrumb-nested
description: Three-level qverse hierarchy active — Breadcrumb should walk ancestors with separators + back arrow.

checkpoints.name: breadcrumb-renders
checkpoints.description: Look at the bottom row of the app (just above the StatusBar). It should be a horizontal Breadcrumb showing the nested qverse path. Pass ONLY if you can see, in this exact left-to-right order: (1) an 'ALL' pill (for superposition), (2) a left-arrow ('←') back-up button, (3) the root context name (e.g. 'Reporting Structure' or 'hierarchy'), (4) a chevron / arrow separator ('›' or '>'), (5) the child context label ('docs'), (6) another chevron, (7) the active context label ('guides') visually highlighted as the active tab (e.g. teal-tinted background). Fail if separators are missing, the back arrow is absent, ancestors are not displayed, or the active tab isn't visually distinguished.

checkpoints.name: back-arrow-only-when-nested
checkpoints.description: The left-arrow ('←') button should be present (it appears only when the active context has a parent). Pass if it is clearly visible immediately to the right of the 'ALL' pill. Fail if the arrow is missing OR is rendered far from the leading pill.
